faqs.answer: Our mosquito control services in Rego Park range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and treatment frequency. faqs.question: How often should I schedule mosquito treatments in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection throughout Queens' mosquito season (May through September), we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks. Most Rego Park homeowners choose our monthly service plan, while properties near Forest Park or with standing water may benefit from more frequent applications during peak season.

faqs.question: Are mosquito control treatments safe for my family and pets in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians. Treatments can be applied to yards, patios, and common areas throughout Rego Park with minimal disruption. Pets and children can typically return to treated areas within 30 minutes of application.

faqs.question: What areas do you treat for mosquitoes in Rego Park properties?
faqs.answer: We treat all mosquito resting and breeding areas including yards, patios, decks, gardens, shrubs, trees, and fence lines. For Rego Park apartment buildings and co-ops, we can treat courtyards, playground areas, and common outdoor spaces. We also identify and address standing water sources where mosquitoes breed.
